fields.helpText: This field is pointed to by the Location of Pain field for GI Endoscopies and the Location of Pneumonia for Pulmonary Endoscopies.  The data is a specified list of sub-anatomies that are commonly used by these two fields. NOTE:  The Location of Pain field has been removed from  the GI Endoscopy templates in version 2.
This field is used to determine whether an item can be selected for GI Endoscopies, Pulmonary Endoscopies or both.
